description: Add a new DSL primitive `VecConst(width=N, value=V, base="hex"|"dec"|"bin")` that emits `localparam logic [N-1:0] <NAME> = N'<base-letter><value>;` in SystemVerilog. Distinct from existing `Const()` (which is a 32/64-bit int parameter). Validates that value fits in width bits. Accepts ConstExpr / Const operands and evaluates them at gen time, emitting the resolved literal value (not the symbolic expression). Constitution Constraint 5 will be amended to scope the 32/64-bit restriction to `Const()` only; `VecConst` admits arbitrary positive widths.
